docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-16-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF ERIN CUSICK-MARTIN IS PRESENT.
